name: EgoDex
data_access: open download (Apple CDN, no credentials; curl then unzip)
license: CC BY-NC-ND: annotation-text redistribution NOT permitted
redistribution: not permitted: CC BY-NC-ND bars sharing derivative or modified annotation text; attribution required, non-commercial only
suitability: analyze locally only: rich task language + 3D hand pose, but ND blocks sharing clustered text
focus_en: 829 hours of Apple Vision Pro egocentric video with native 3D hand pose over 194 tabletop tasks, each with a GPT-generated task description.
focus_cn: 829 小时的 Apple Vision Pro 第一人称视频，原生三维手部姿态，覆盖 194 个桌面任务，每段配有 GPT 生成的任务描述。
datapath_en: EgoDex is 829 hours of 30 Hz 1080p egocentric video recorded on Apple Vision Pro, about 90 million frames and roughly 338,000 demonstrations across 194 tabletop manipulation tasks. Each demonstration is an MP4 paired with an HDF5 file of native 3D pose (head, upper body, and detailed per-finger hand joints) and a GPT-generated natural-language task instruction. The data downloads directly from Apple's CDN with no credentials and the repo ships a minimal PyTorch loader, so policies can be pretrained or imitation-learned locally with optional hand-to-robot retargeting. The CC BY-NC-ND license permits non-commercial research but bars redistributing derivative annotation text.
datapath_cn: EgoDex 是在 Apple Vision Pro 上录制的 829 小时 30 Hz 1080p 第一人称视频，约 9000 万帧、约 33.8 万条演示，覆盖 194 个桌面操作任务。每条演示为一个 MP4，配有记录原生三维姿态（头部、上半身与逐指细节手部关节）的 HDF5 文件，以及一条 GPT 生成的自然语言任务指令。数据可从 Apple 的 CDN 无需凭证直接下载，仓库提供精简的 PyTorch 加载器，因此可在本地预训练或模仿学习策略，并可选地进行手到机器人的重定向。CC BY-NC-ND 许可允许非商业研究，但禁止再分发演绎的标注文本。
flow_en: MP4 + HDF5 3D hand and body pose
evaluate on the frozen test split
flow_cn: Apple Vision Pro 第一人称采集
MP4 + HDF5 三维手部与身体姿态
每段配 GPT 生成的任务指令
预训练或模仿学习操作策略
no_corpus_en: EgoDex is openly downloadable, but its license is CC BY-NC-ND, which forbids redistributing derivative or modified annotation text. The GPT-generated task instructions can be analyzed locally, yet the no-derivatives clause blocks sharing a clustered version of the strings. EgoDex is therefore documented descriptively, with links to the open Apple download rather than an embedded corpus.
no_corpus_cn: EgoDex 可公开下载，但其许可为 CC BY-NC-ND，禁止再分发演绎或修改后的标注文本。GPT 生成的任务指令可在本地分析，但禁止演绎条款使得无法共享聚类后的字符串版本。因此以描述性方式记录 EgoDex，并链接到 Apple 的公开下载，而非内嵌语料。
example_credit: EgoDex, Hoque et al., Apple, ICLR 2026
example_caption_en: EgoDex records Apple Vision Pro egocentric video with 3D hand pose; the project page shows a grid of frames with hand-tracking overlays.
example_caption_cn: EgoDex 录制带三维手部姿态的 Apple Vision Pro 第一人称视频；项目主页展示带手部跟踪叠加的画面网格。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2505.11709 (Comments field: ICLR 2026), machinelearning.apple.com, and github.com/apple/ml-egodex. Dataset CC BY-NC-ND (no-derivatives).
citation: Hoque, Huang, Yoon, Sivapurapu, and Zhang, EgoDex: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Large-Scale Egocentric Video, ICLR 2026 (arXiv:2505.11709).
